creator: Alexander Terp
description: Set up release infrastructure to enable hotfix/patch releases on older minor versions (e.g. v0.7.1, v0.8.1). Currently we can only release from the latest. Motivated by #105 where users on older versions hit a segfault but can't get a fix without upgrading to the latest minor. Likely involves maintaining release branches (e.g. release/v0.7, release/v0.8) and updating CI/goreleaser to support building from them.
title: Support patch releases on previous minor versions
